14-OPENBLAS-BENCHMARK dgemv_2048x2048 RISC-V perf stat
======================================================

Source CSV: /workspace/results/14-openblas-benchmark_results.csv
TestName: dgemv_2048x2048
Architecture column: PerformanceValue

Raw perf stat metrics
---------------------
| Metric | RISC-V value |
|---|---:|
| duration_time | 178,437,499 |
| task_clock | 698.8800000000 |
| cpu_cycle | 1,816,602,679 |
| instruction | 605,901,094 |
| cache_references | 40,226,828 |
| cache_misses | 40,226,952 |
| branches | 66,327,622 |
| branch_misses | 79,090 |
| L1_dcache_loads | 131,352,149 |
| L1_dcache_load_misses | 4,878,835 |
| LLC_load_misses | 32,999,193 |
| LLC_loads | 40,227,511 |
| IPC | 0.3335350000 |
| benchmark_ms | 81.5150639974 |
| gflops | 0.8232694757 |
| gbps | 3.2979017475 |
| checksum | 2,857.1678878500 |
| threads | 4 |

Derived metrics
---------------
| Metric | Value |
|---|---:|
| duration_s | 0.178437 |
| cache_miss_rate | 100.000% |
| branch_miss_rate | 0.119% |
| L1_dcache_load_miss_rate | 3.714% |
| LLC_load_miss_rate | 82.031% |
